Retractor Lite 47 Hardware Specifications & Display Features

Our professional Retractor Lite 47 Hardware provides the perfect foundation for your custom banner displays at trade shows, retail environments, and business presentations. This lightweight aluminum retractor system offers superior portability without compromising stability.

Key Hardware Features

  • Lightweight aluminum base construction for easy transport
  • Available in black or silver finish options
  • Two swivel feet provide enhanced stability on various surfaces
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick setup and takedown
  • Snap rail attachment system for secure banner mounting
  • Banner tape bottom attachment for professional display

Display Dimensions & Specifications

  • Display Size: 48" W x 83" H x 15" D
  • Hardware Weight: 10.25 lbs
  • Portable design ideal for trade shows and events
  • Compatible with custom printed banners (sold separately)

This professional retractor hardware is designed for businesses, trade show exhibitors, and organizations requiring reliable, portable display solutions for their custom banners.

Banner Specifications for Retractor Hardware Compatibility

Ensure optimal display results by following these banner specifications designed specifically for the Retractor Lite 47 Hardware system.

Banner Dimensions Required

  • Standard banner size: 47" W x 81" H
  • Snap rail attachment area at top
  • Banner tape attachment area at bottom
  • Full bleed artwork recommended

Attachment System Requirements

  • Top snap rail requires 1" attachment area
  • Bottom banner tape requires 2" hem allowance
  • Keep important graphics within safe area boundaries
  • Account for slight banner curve when displaying

File Preparation Guidelines

  • High resolution artwork: 150 DPI minimum
  • CMYK color mode for accurate printing
  • Include bleed area for edge-to-edge printing
  • Avoid critical text near attachment areas

Banner Material Compatibility

  • Compatible with vinyl banner materials
  • Fabric banner options available
  • Mesh banners suitable for outdoor use
  • Consult with customer service for material selection

Note: Banners are ordered separately from hardware. Contact our design team for assistance with banner artwork preparation and material selection.

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractor Hardware

What banner size works with the Retractor Lite 47 Hardware?

The hardware is designed for banners measuring 47" wide by 81" tall. The snap rail system at the top and banner tape attachment at the bottom ensure secure, wrinkle-free display.

How much does the retractor hardware weigh?

The complete Retractor Lite 47 Hardware weighs only 10.25 lbs, making it easy to transport to trade shows, events, and between business locations.

What's the difference between black and silver finishes?

Both finishes offer the same professional quality and durability. Black provides a sleek, modern appearance, while silver offers a classic look that complements any banner design. Choose based on your display preferences.

Do I need tools to set up the retractor hardware?

No tools required. The shock cord pole system allows for quick, tool-free assembly. Simply extend the poles, attach your banner to the snap rail and bottom tape, and adjust the swivel feet for stability.

Can I use this hardware outdoors?

While the aluminum construction is weather-resistant, this hardware is primarily designed for indoor use at trade shows, retail environments, and business presentations. For outdoor applications, consider our weighted base options.

Is the banner included with the hardware?

No, banners are ordered separately. This allows you to customize your banner design and material based on your specific display needs. We offer various banner materials compatible with this hardware system.

What's included with the hardware purchase?

Your order includes the complete Retractor Lite 47 Hardware system: aluminum base, shock cord poles, snap rail, banner tape attachment, and swivel feet with rubber pads.

How do I attach my banner to the hardware?

Banners attach using the snap rail system at the top and banner tape at the bottom. The snap rail provides secure attachment, while the banner tape creates a wrinkle-free bottom edge for professional display.
